heading: Discontinuance of land offices by President
label: 121 Discontinuance of land offices by President
text: Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of the Interior, the President may order the discontinuance of any land office and the transfer of any of its business and archives to any other land office within the same State or Territory.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2252 derived from , .act May 30, 1862, ch. 86, § 512 Stat. 409
